notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 20-24 in generated discovery row order.

dominate-person::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save, Advantage when the caster or allies are fighting the target, and on-damage repeat save are still prose-only in runtime.
dominate-person::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add domination save fields for initial save, combat-state advantage, and on-damage repeat save.

dominate-person::reaction_or_opportunity.issue: The caster can command the target to take a Reaction but must spend the caster's own Reaction; runtime lacks reaction command economy.
dominate-person::reaction_or_opportunity.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-target reaction command fields with controller reaction cost.

dominate-person::target_filter_or_eligib.issue: The Humanoid target filter is already represented in runtime targeting.
dominate-person::target_filter_or_eligib.recommendedTemplateChange: No target-filter field required for this pass.

dominate-person::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary visible target selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

dominate-person::message_or_communicatio.issue: The caster has a same-plane telepathic link with the Charmed target and can issue no-action commands through it; runtime lacks telepathic-link fields.
dominate-person::message_or_communicatio.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telepathic link fields for target condition, same-plane requirement, command use, and examples.

dominate-person::summon_or_controlled_en.issue: The Charmed target obeys no-action commands on its turn, has fallback self-protection behavior, can be commanded to use a Reaction at caster reaction cost, and repeats saves on damage; runtime lacks dominated-target control fields.
dominate-person::summon_or_controlled_en.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dominated-target control fields distinct from summon fields.

dominate-person::travel_or_planar_moveme.issue: The same-plane phrase constrains telepathy and does not move a creature between planes.
dominate-person::travel_or_planar_moveme.recommendedJsonChange: No travel/planar movement runtime data required.

dominate-person::social_or_knowledge_eff.issue: Charmed, telepathic command obedience, same-plane communication, and default behavior are all social/control mechanics, but runtime preserves them only in prose.

dominate-person::status_or_state_change.issue: The target gains Charmed for the duration, with repeat save on damage and domination riders; runtime lacks typed Charmed effect and status riders.
dominate-person::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add Charmed status plus domination rider fields.
dominate-person::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Charmed STATUS_CONDITION and domination riders.

dream::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: If the messenger is terrifying, the target makes a Wisdom save; on failure it gains no rest benefit and takes 3d6 Psychic damage on waking. Runtime lacks this optional save/damage/rest branch.
dream::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add optional nightmare branch fields for message length, Wisdom save, delayed wake damage, and rest-benefit denial.

dream::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The messenger can shape the dream environment with landscapes, objects, and images; runtime lacks typed dream illusion/environment-shaping fields.

dream::message_or_communication.issue: The messenger can converse with a sleeping target and optionally deliver a terrifying message of up to ten words; runtime lacks typed dream communication fields.
dream::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dream communication fields for conversation, target sleep requirement, and message word limit.

dream::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The same-plane requirement gates targeting and does not move a creature between planes.
dream::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: No travel/planar movement runtime data required.

dream::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The spell targets a known same-plane creature, reports whether the target is awake, can wait for sleep, and makes the target perfectly recall the dream; runtime lacks typed dream-knowledge and memory fields.
dream::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dream target knowledge, awake-state feedback, wait-for-sleep, and perfect-recall fields.

dream::status_or_state_change.issue: The messenger is Incapacitated and has Speed 0 while in trance; runtime lacks typed trance status/speed effects.
dream::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add messenger trance state fields for Incapacitated and Speed 0.

dream::conditional_ending.issue: The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time to end the spell, and if the target is awake the messenger can end the trance/spell or wait for sleep; runtime lacks these ending choices.

enervation::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Runtime has the initial Dexterity save but flattens success as half damage; canonical success is 2d8 and spell ends, while failure is 4d8 and enables sustained damage.
enervation::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-branch damage fields with different success/failure dice and branch outcomes.

enervation::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: After a failed save, the caster can use an action each turn to automatically deal 4d8 Necrotic damage; the spell ends if the caster uses the action for anything else. Runtime lacks sustained action and missed-action ending fields.
enervation::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained damage action fields with required action each turn and fail-to-sustain ending.

enervation::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target selection and descriptive inky darkness; the visible target is targeting, and the inky appearance is not a separate light/sound mechanic.

enervation::resource_or_consumption.issue: The caster regains hit points from damage dealt; this is healing/life-drain, not resource consumption.

enervation::healing_or_restoration.issue: Whenever the spell deals damage, the caster regains hit points equal to half the Necrotic damage taken; runtime lacks linked life-drain healing fields.
enervation::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage-linked healing fields for half damage dealt.

enervation::object_stats_or_damageabilit.issue: The detector matched damage amounts and healing, but no object stats or object damageability are involved.

enervation::environmental_change.issue: The inky tendril is spell presentation and does not change the environment.

enervation::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends on successful initial save, on caster using an action for anything else, when target leaves range, or when target has total cover; runtime lacks these branch and ending conditions.
enervation::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add branch-ending and sustain-ending fields for save success, action use, range loss, and total cover.

far-step::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched bonus action wording, but Far Step does not modify attacks, saves, or checks.
far-step::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under sustain action and teleport movement.

far-step::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: The teleport destination must be an unoccupied visible space up to 60 feet away; runtime now has teleport movement but lacks unoccupied visible destination fields.
far-step::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination eligibility fields for visible and unoccupied space.

far-step::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: On each later turn before the spell ends, the caster can use a bonus action to teleport again; runtime has the teleport effect but lacks repeat granted-action semantics.
far-step::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeat teleport action fields for bonus-action reuse while active.

far-step::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible destination selection, which is a teleport destination filter rather than a vision/light/sound effect.

far-step::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The 60-foot teleport movement is now represented as a MOVEMENT teleport effect; repeat-use precision remains tracked under sustain_or_recast_action.
far-step::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No new travel field required for this pass.

far-step::conditional_ending.issue: The bonus-action repeat lasts until the normal spell duration ends; no special conditional ending is present.

flame-strike::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Dexterity save, half-damage outcome, Fire damage, Radiant damage, and +1d6 scaling to both damage components are now represented.
flame-strike::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
flame-strike::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding the missing Radiant DAMAGE effect and scaling.

flame-strike::environmental_change.issue: The vertical column of fire is instantaneous spell presentation and damage delivery, not a persistent environmental change.
